'''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon''''' was the first story-arc in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (miniseries)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] miniseries.

[[HighBridge Audio]] released an [[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of the comic series.
